metadata.name: Use Data Analytics to Find Duplicate Payments

description: An auditor uses data analytics to search for potential duplicate payments in the accounts payable ledger.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a data dump of all vendor payments made in the last fiscal year.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor receives the complete accounts payable data.

nodes.task_description: Run a data analytics script that searches for payments with the same vendor, same invoice number, and same dollar amount.

expected_outcome.value: The script identifies 15 potential duplicate payments.

nodes.task_description: Investigate the potential duplicates to confirm if they are true errors or legitimate payments, and document any confirmed duplicates as a finding.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor confirms 4 of the payments were true duplicates and creates a finding.
